title: Diagnose a Memory Leak Under Load
description: A worker-pool grows in memory after a deployment and is OOMKilled repeatedly.
alert:
worker-pool OOMKilled (3 occurrences, last 20 min)
Container memory grew from 200MB to 1.8GB over 18 minutes.
initial_log_excerpt:
[worker-pool] INFO worker boot complete
[worker-pool] INFO job cache-warmup started
[worker-pool] INFO job cache-warmup finished batch=5000

deployment_history.summary: add cache-warmup background job to worker-pool

diffs.deploy-204:
diff --git a/jobs/cache_warmup.py b/jobs/cache_warmup.py
+processed_items = []
+
+def run_cache_warmup(items):
+    for item in items:
+        processed_items.append(item)
+        warm_cache(item)

2026-04-05T14:18:00Z.note: ProcessedItem instances retain references from jobs.cache_warmup.processed_items

accepted_remediations: clear processed_items list in job teardown
